tasks.label: Build
tasks.detail: Build the project for the selected variant

tasks.label: Flash Configuration

linux.command: BUILD_DIR="${command:cmake.buildDirectory}"; echo "Using Build Dir: $BUILD_DIR"; VARIANT=$(grep "BUILD_TARGET:STRING" "$BUILD_DIR/CMakeCache.txt" | cut -d= -f2); echo "Target Variant: $VARIANT"; if [ "$VARIANT" = "OBC" ]; then UF2="phoenix-avionics.uf2"; BUS="8"; DEV="/dev/ttyOBC"; elif [ "$VARIANT" = "SENSOR" ]; then UF2="sensor_node.uf2"; BUS="7"; DEV="/dev/ttySENSOR"; else echo "❌ Current variant is '$VARIANT'. Please select 'Main OBC' or 'Sensor Node' from the CMake Variant selector (bottom bar) instead of 'ALL/Debug'."; exit 1; fi; echo "✅ Flashing $UF2 to Bus $BUS..."; cmake --build "$BUILD_DIR" && find "$BUILD_DIR" -name "$UF2" -exec scp {} rock@100.115.224.114:~/firmware.uf2 \; && ssh -t rock@100.115.224.114 "sudo fuser -k $DEV 2>/dev/null; sudo picotool load --bus $BUS -f ~/firmware.uf2"

tasks.detail: Builds and flashes the currently selected CMake Variant

tasks.label: Monitor Active Variant

linux.command: BUILD_DIR="${command:cmake.buildDirectory}"; VARIANT=$(grep "BUILD_TARGET:STRING" "$BUILD_DIR/CMakeCache.txt" | cut -d= -f2); if [ "$VARIANT" = "OBC" ]; then DEV="/dev/ttyOBC"; elif [ "$VARIANT" = "SENSOR" ]; then DEV="/dev/ttySENSOR"; else echo "❌ Invalid variant selected."; exit 1; fi; echo "Opening Monitor for $VARIANT on $DEV..."; ssh -t rock@100.115.224.114 "sudo fuser -k $DEV 2>/dev/null; sudo rm -f /var/lock/LCK..*; sleep 0.5; minicom -D $DEV -b 115200"

tasks.detail: Opens minicom for the currently selected CMake Variant

tasks.label: Flash and Monitor
tasks.detail: Build, Flash, and then Open Monitor

tasks.label: Reboot Pico
tasks.detail: Reboot any connected Pico (Warning: might reboot both)
